assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 14-18 show: '1. **Checkout the target (feature) branch**: git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' — explicitly checks out TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 25-29 show: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"' and explicitly states 'The PR targets TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-23 show: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly state 'The task branch is named after the task ID (TC-9205), NOT after the target branch.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 50-56 in the Pre-Implementation Verification section explicitly list inspecting all three files: (1) 'Inspect migration/src/lib.rs using Serena', (2) 'Inspect migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs using Serena', (3) 'Inspect entity/src/advisory.rs using Serena to verify that the Advisory entity no longer references the status column'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 112 states: 'With the trailer: `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 99-110 show the commit message starting with 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration) and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8 explicitly states '**Target Branch**: TC-9005 (feature branch)' and line 9 identifies '**Parent Feature**: TC-9005 (linked via "is incorporated by")'. The entire Branch Operations section is built around TC-9005 as the target branch, matching the '## Target Branch\nTC-9005' section from the task fixture.
